title: antirrhinum pulverulentum subsp. pertegasii
intro: Antirrhinum pulverulentum subsp. pertegasii, also known as the Iberian snapdragon, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Plantaginaceae. It is native to the Iberian Peninsula and has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, making it a potential treatment for conditions like bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Antirrhinum pulverulentum subsp. pertegasii can be made into infusions, tinctures, and teas, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
